blocks.body: Multiply as if the decimal points do not exist. Count the total decimal places in both factors. Place the decimal point that many places from the right in the product.

blocks.label: Example
blocks.body: 2.3 x 1.4: multiply 23 x 14 = 322. Total decimal places = 1 + 1 = 2. Answer: 3.22.
To divide by a decimal: move the decimal in the divisor right to make it a whole number. Move the decimal in the dividend the same number of places right. Then divide normally.
To divide a decimal by a whole number, divide normally and bring the decimal point straight up into the quotient. Example: 6.36 / 3 = 2.12.
